allow: PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s emulator-5554 shell am start -n com.indoor.indoor_nav/.MainActivity 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; cd d:\\Claude\\Navigation\\apps\\editor; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command `"cd d:\\Claude\\Navigation\\apps\\editor; npm run dev`"" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "Dev server started")

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $\($p.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Host "Nothing on 5173" })

PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; cd d:\\Claude\\Navigation\\apps\\editor; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; cd d:\\Claude\\Navigation\\apps\\editor; npm run dev } ; Start-Sleep 10; Receive-Job $job; $null = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Port 5173 listening: $\($?\)")
